_documented_2026_04_25: Pre-fix (Apr 22-24, 2026) 48-hour rollup of warmup/skip + squeeze events. Used by graders/compression_squeeze.py to compute the % drop after Fix E (min_squeeze_bars 5->12).
_derivation: 1976 NO_SIGNAL squeeze_not_held_min_bars events / 2 sessions = 988 per session. Fix E sets min_squeeze_bars=12 (was 5); we predict the per-session count drops to <=692 (>=30% drop).
